name: rumcap
description: The compact, self-describing .rcap web-performance capture format: resource/navigation/user timing, long tasks, LoAF, JS self-profiling and custom spans on one timeline — a streaming encoder and a separate, tree-shakeable decoder.
//sideEffects: All modules are pure (definitions only, no top-level side effects), so bundlers may drop unused exports — this is what tree-shakes the decode side off the on-page encode path. See docs/FileFormat.md.

scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); for (const f of fs.readdirSync('.')) if (f.endsWith('.tsbuildinfo')) fs.rmSync(f,{force:true});"
scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build
